case_title: NICHOLAS EARL HUBER VS. JOSEPH LEE ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUBER, NICHOLAS EARL AS TO DEFENDANT FAZZINO, JOANNE
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUBER, NICHOLAS EARL
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $551.82 ACCRUED INTEREST, $25.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JOSEPH
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE HUBER, STEPHEN KURT AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, JOSEPH
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR MOTION TO VACATE HEARING SET FOR AUG-13-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF NICHOLAS EARL HUBER IS PRESENT VIA COURT CALL. DEFENDANTS JOSEPH LEE AND WU LITUNG LEE ARE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS WU LITUNG LEE WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR LACK OF SERVICE. PLAINITFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUBER, NICHOLAS EARL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, JOSEPH $9,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,825.00, AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST THE CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT WU LITUNG LEE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS NO PROOF OF SERVICE. INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $5000.00 AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK:RETURN MAIL ON NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD
